reason: Verify Chat UI remains consistent with sidebar/composer/tab constraints.
Verify currentCwd, activeSession, and tab projection do not regress.
Verify i18n, a11y, strict TypeScript, and build expectations.
Verify TS/Rust command payload type alignment.
Verify new commands remain thin and return Result<T, String>.
Verify command signatures and response contracts are documented and matched.
Verify boundary, empty state, and state synchronization cases.
